title: mentha × suavis var. schultzii
intro: Mentha × suavis var. schultzii, also known as Bergamot Mint, is a unique and rare variety of mint that is a cross between Mentha suaveolens and a bergamot-scented mint. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding abilities. The health benefits of Bergamot Mint include relief from digestive issues, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved respiratory health, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Bergamot Mint can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
